steps.subject: Garage door repairs for your inspection clients
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

I'm Tal with Goldman's Garage Door Repair in {city}. I work with a few home inspectors in the area and wanted to reach out.

When you flag a garage door issue in a report — broken spring, frayed cable, opener safety sensor not working — your clients usually ask "who should I call?" I'd like to be that answer.

Here's what we offer your clients:

- 10% discount when referred by an inspector
- Repairs done before closing so the deal doesn't stall
- Written repair report you can reference in your documentation

I also have a garage door safety code reference card I can send you — handy for quick checks during inspections.

Worth connecting?

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Re: Garage door repairs for your inspection clients
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Following up on my note about garage door repairs for your inspection clients.

The most common things we see from inspection reports: worn torsion springs, opener force settings out of spec, weather seal gaps, and safety reverse not triggering properly. All stuff we can knock out in a single visit, usually same day.

The nice part for you — we give your client a written report when we're done, so there's a paper trail for the transaction. Makes everyone's life easier at closing.

Happy to send over that safety code reference card if it'd be useful on your inspections.

Tal
{phone}

steps.subject: Standing offer, {first_name}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Last note from me — I won't keep filling your inbox. Just wanted to leave this open.

Next time a garage door issue shows up on one of your inspections in {city}, give me a call or text. We'll get your client taken care of fast with the 10% inspector referral discount.

Save my number for when it comes up.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

notes: Send from MI number for MI leads, NC number for NC leads. Target inspectors with 4.0+ rating and 3+ reviews.
